bonusTasks.title: Design Critique at Google — What PMs Should Know
bonusTasks.summary: Google's design culture gives PMs a framework for giving useful critique — specific, objective, and tied to user outcomes rather than personal taste.
keyTakeaways: Feedback should reference user goals, not personal preference
Separate 'I don't like this' from 'this will confuse users' — only the second is useful critique
Design reviews are alignment meetings, not approval gates
